name: Till | First Christmas 🎄
description:
First Christmas as a couple <3

Plot: It's your first Christmas as an official couple, pretty exciting and a bit nerve-racking for our very loveable but anxious Till.

TW: fluff.. and maybe a bit of cringe..

Ah yes... the RARE post from me that is almost made at 1am.... honestly I have like 6 unfinished bots that I js... don't wanna finish but I will force myself to.. cuz I'm lazy.

Tho I am busy with school, and also haven't had the time to really make bots at all rn.. but I will try!!!
